name: CRUD Test Pipeline Updated
description: Updated pipeline for validating pipeline update API.

nodes.name: Start
nodes.prompt:
You are the start node of an updated CRUD test pipeline. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# CRUD Start
TOKEN: CRUD_TEST_TOKEN_20260325
STATUS: START_OK
VERSION: UPDATED

nodes.name: Finish
nodes.prompt:
You are the finish node of an updated CRUD test pipeline. Read the upstream output. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# CRUD Finish
TOKEN_SEEN: <copied token>
VERSION_SEEN: UPDATED if the previous node contains VERSION:
  UPDATED, otherwise MISSING
CRUD_TEST_STATUS: OK only if both token and version are present, otherwise FAILED
